source="U6LX5jDokopkNKgsbr5S-3" target="U6LX5jDokopkNKgsbr5S-5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="U6LX5jDokopkNKgsbr5S-3" value="For new invoice&nbsp;<div><ol><li><b style="background-color: initial;">customer&nbsp;</b><span style="background-color: initial;">Should be taken from liability;</span></li><li><b style="background-color: initial;">billing group, contract, receipt of an invoice, communication data for billing&nbsp;<br></b>should be taken from liability's connected invoice</li><li><b style="background-color: initial;">templates, issuer, number of income account, basis for issuing, cost center&nbsp;<br></b><span style="background-color: initial;">should be taken from "taxes for the grid operator" nomenclature</span></li><li><b style="background-color: initial;">Document type&nbsp; </b><span style="background-color: initial;">should be invoice</span></li><li><b style="background-color: initial;">Status </b><span style="background-color: initial;">should be real, immediately create real invoice without draft</span></li><li><b style="background-color: initial;">Tax even date </b><span style="background-color: initial;">should be current day</span></li><li><b style="background-color: initial;">Payment date </b><span style="background-color: initial;">should be calculated according payment term from contract which is from latest liability's connected invoice</span></li><li><b style="background-color: initial;"><font color="#66b2ff">invoice type&nbsp; ???</font></b></li><li><b>meter reading from, meter reading to </b>should be empty</li><li><b>applicable interest rate </b>should be empty</li><li><b>direct debit </b>should be added from billing group or from contract or from customer (billing group and customer from latest liability, contract from latest liability's connected invoice)&nbsp;</li><li><b>Vat rate </b>should be default vat rate</li><li><b>amount excluding vat </b>should be taken from "grid operator taxes" nomenclature's tax for reconnection field</li><li><b>Value of vat </b>should be equal (amount excluding vat*Vat rate)</li><li>In summery data tab should have only 1 row and in this row should be filled following 3 field:</li><ol><li><b>price component or price component group or item<br></b>value should be taken from "taxes for grid operator" div.div:
Load 2nd tab
row data should include following fields:
1.Point of delivery - from list
2.Customer - from list
3.Contract - all different contract from invoices from list separator should be comma
4.Alternative recipient of an invoice - all different alternative recipient from billing group, separator should be comma
5.Billing group - all different billing group from liabilities from list, separator should be comma
6.POD with highest consumption - Yes, No. Should have as many values of Yes/No as many billing group has POD, Yes if POD has highest consumption in this billing group, else No
7.Liabilities in this billing group - all liabilities from list for billing groups which should be loaded. separator should be comma
8. Liabilities in POD - all liabilities for this POD from list, separator should be comma
